examples.ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 small jar Marshmallow Creme, 1 Tbsp. orange juice

Sprinkle with nuts. Put back into refrigerator.

examples.ingredients: 3 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 2 large chicken breasts, boned, skinned and cut into 1/2-inch cubes, 1 Tbsp. sherry, 2 tsp. sugar, 1 tsp. white vinegar, 1/4 c. Planters peanut oil, 1 tsp. crushed red pepper, 1/3 c. sliced scallions, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger

examples.reference: Mix ingredients together. Add enough mayonnaise to moisten. Chill until ready to serve.
examples.prediction: combine all ingredients, except shrimp and shrimp. mix. chill until ready to serve. top with lettuce, tomatoes and cucumbers.

examples.ingredients: 1 onion, 2 cans tomatoes, 1 can corn, 1 can Great Northern beans, 2 Tbsp. chili powder or more to make hot, salt and pepper, 1 lb. hamburger, green pepper (optional)
examples.reference: Brown meat and onion until brown. (Don't drain.) Add tomatoes and all other ingredients in a crock-pot or deep dish. Simmer 4 hours. Best if eaten next day.
examples.prediction: brown hamburger, onion and green pepper. add tomatoes, corn, chili powder, salt and pepper to taste. simmer for 30 minutes.

examples.ingredients: 1 c. soy sauce, 1/3 c. olive oil, 1/3 c. wine, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 4 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger or freshly grated, 1 tsp. fresh ground black pepper
examples.reference: Combine mix with whisk; marinate 6 hours in Ziploc bag, then use for basting. This can be used for chicken or any steak, grilled or broiled. Try it on roast chicken in the oven, basting occasionally.
examples.prediction: combine all ingredients in a small bowl and mix well. marinate meat for at least 2 hours. grill or broil chicken, basting frequently with marinade.

examples.ingredients: turkey, cut up, turkey gravy or broth, vegetables (any kind), chopped, 2 handfuls cauliflower, 3 tsp. chicken bouillon, 1 tsp. beef bouillon, 1 small can tomatoes, diced, 2 potatoes, diced, 1 can corn, 1 pkg. mixed vegetables, garlic powder
examples.reference: Using turkey gravy or broth as a base, add all other ingredients to it and stir together. Cook on low heat for 2 to 3 hours.
examples.prediction: boil water in a large pot and add bouillon, potatoes, potatoes, vegetables, garlic powder and turkey broth. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes. add cauliflower, corn and mixed vegetables. simmer for 3 1/2 minutes more.
